product.name: Kipika Wall Mounted Pull Up Bar - Heavy Duty 450 LB Capacity Doorway Chin Up Bar for Home Gym, Sturdy Steel Construction with Resistance Band Hooks | Hanging Exercise Bar for Full Body Workout
product.description: Kipika Pull Up Bar | Hanging Exercise Bar for Full Body Workout
features: 【Ultra-Stable Wall Mount Pull Up Bar with 6-Hole Design】Made of 1.3 inch durable steel, this wall mount pull up bar features a robust 6-hole mounting design for superior stability and safety. It withstands years of heavy use, offering more security than standard bars for intense strength training

【Versatile Doorway Hanging Bar with Accessory Holes】Equipped with reinforced holes and carabiners, this multi-functional pull up bar expands your exercise library. Easily attach suspension trainers, resistance bands, or rings for rows, leg raises, and assisted pull-ups, transforming your doorway into a full functional training station

【Heavy-Duty 450LB Capacity & Professional Stability】Engineered with high-strength steel and three reinforced mounting brackets, this bar provides unwavering stability for intense workouts. The industrial welding and rust-proof coating safely support up to 450 lbs, meeting professional training demands

【Ergonomic Pull Up Foam Handles for Comfort & Safety】This wall mount pull up bar features perfectly sized 1.3-inch diameter pull up handles with a comfortable, non-slip surface. The circular anti-collision edges protect your hands and doorframes, ensuring a secure, pain-free grip for intense back, arm, and core workouts

【Quick Installation for Full-Range Workouts】This pull up bar comes with all hardware and instructions for easy mounting on solid walls or wood beams. The 4.9-inch wall-to-bar spacing provides ample room for full range-of-motion exercises. US Patent Pending. All Rights Reserved
